Video.summary: Learn how cosmology takes the entire universe as its subject.
Video.grandparentTitle: Cosmology: The History and Nature of Our Universe
Video.title: The Journey Ahead

Video.summary: Explore the hierarchy of structures in the universe.
Video.grandparentTitle: Cosmology: The History and Nature of Our Universe
Video.title: Denizens of the Universe

Video.summary: Is the universe lumpy, or smooth, or is it both?
Video.grandparentTitle: Cosmology: The History and Nature of Our Universe
Video.title: Overall Cosmic Properties

Video.summary: By far, the bulk of the universe is dark energy and dark matter.
Video.grandparentTitle: Cosmology: The History and Nature of Our Universe
Video.title: The Stuff of the Universe

Video.summary: Survey the history of the universe, from the big bang to a possible future.
Video.grandparentTitle: Cosmology: The History and Nature of Our Universe
Video.title: The Sweep of Cosmic History

Video.summary: Learn how a "distance ladder" helps us determine distances in the universe.
Video.grandparentTitle: Cosmology: The History and Nature of Our Universe
Video.title: Measuring Distances

Video.summary: According to Doppler shift measurements, galaxies are moving away from us.
Video.grandparentTitle: Cosmology: The History and Nature of Our Universe
Video.title: Expansion and Age

Video.summary: Consider three important cosmological distances in the universe.
Video.grandparentTitle: Cosmology: The History and Nature of Our Universe
Video.title: Distances, Appearances, and Horizons

Video.summary: Start your journey through forensic history with the Jack the Ripper murders.
Video.grandparentTitle: Forensic History: Crimes, Frauds, and Scandals
Video.title: The Infamous Jack the Ripper

Video.summary: Study the special forensic category known as lust murder with the 1947 murder-mutilation of the Black Dahlia.
Video.grandparentTitle: Forensic History: Crimes, Frauds, and Scandals
Video.title: Analyzing the Black Dahlia Murder

Video.summary: Go to Hollywood and look at how crime scene investigation and autopsy results solve mysteries.
Video.grandparentTitle: Forensic History: Crimes, Frauds, and Scandals
Video.title: Dissecting Hollywood Deaths

Video.summary: How can cutting-edge research and technology be applied to old cases and result in fresh conclusions?
Video.grandparentTitle: Forensic History: Crimes, Frauds, and Scandals
Video.title: Decomposition and Confusing Interpretations

Video.summary: Discover how a relatively unknown person becomes infamous.
Video.grandparentTitle: Forensic History: Crimes, Frauds, and Scandals
Video.title: Lizzie Borden and the Menendez Brothers

Image.alt: Lizzie Borden and the Menendez Brothers
Lizzie Borden and the Menendez Brothers
Lizzie Borden and the Menendez Brothers

Video.summary: Join forensic scientists on the search for the culprit of people killed with cyanide-laced Tylenol capsules.
Video.grandparentTitle: Forensic History: Crimes, Frauds, and Scandals
Video.title: The Tylenol Murders

Video.summary: Plunge into the world of copycats, hoaxes, and false claims.
Video.grandparentTitle: Forensic History: Crimes, Frauds, and Scandals
Video.title: Copycats and Hoaxes

Video.summary: Delve into the fascinating stories behind history's many art and document forgeries - efforts of con artists.
Video.grandparentTitle: Forensic History: Crimes, Frauds, and Scandals
Video.title: Frauds and Forgeries

Video.summary: Begin your understanding of Europe as not only a place but as an evolving laboratory of ideas.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Development of European Civilization
Video.title: The Idea and Place of Europe

Image.alt: The Idea and Place of Europe
The Idea and Place of Europe
The Idea and Place of Europe

Video.summary: Gain a firm foundation for understanding the medieval world with this introduction to feudalism.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Development of European Civilization
Video.title: Feudalism and the Medieval World

Video.summary: Plunge more deeply into the medieval world by grounding yourself in its three core components.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Development of European Civilization
Video.title: The Three Orders of Medieval Society

Image.alt: The Three Orders of Medieval Society
The Three Orders of Medieval Society
The Three Orders of Medieval Society

Video.summary: Explore life on the manor and the transition from feudalism triggered by the emergence of money.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Development of European Civilization
Video.title: The Manorial Economy

Video.summary: Learn how factors like the Crusades and the Black Death helped pave the way for a new era of great cities.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Development of European Civilization
Video.title: The Growth of Trade and Towns

Image.alt: The Growth of Trade and Towns
The Growth of Trade and Towns
The Growth of Trade and Towns

Video.summary: Learn how the merchant class's need for a different kind of ideology led to the cultivation of humanism.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Development of European Civilization
Video.title: Humanism and the Italian Renaissance

Video.summary: Meet Charles the Great, the Carolingian king who would become Charlemagne.
Video.grandparentTitle: Charlemagne: Father of Europe
Video.title: The Making of Emperor Charles the Great

Image.alt: The Making of Emperor Charles the Great
The Making of Emperor Charles the Great
The Making of Emperor Charles the Great

Video.summary: Go back to the formative years of Charlemagne's life before he ascended to the imperial throne.
Video.grandparentTitle: Charlemagne: Father of Europe
Video.title: Charlemagne as Heir and King, 748-800
